title: Continue Free Trial Status
description: Schema for the free-trial status response from GET /ide/free-trial-status. Tracks the per-user chat and autocomplete quotas for Continue's hosted free trial.

optedInToFreeTrial.description: Whether the user has opted into the Continue-managed free trial.

chatCount.description: Current number of chat messages used in the trial window.

autocompleteCount.description: Current number of autocomplete requests used in the trial window.

chatLimit.description: Maximum number of chat messages allowed in the free trial.

autocompleteLimit.description: Maximum number of autocomplete requests allowed in the free trial.
